overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a character walking through a modern downtown urban environment. The character crosses streets and walks along sidewalks past office buildings, traffic, and pedestrians on a clear sunny day.

tall palm trees lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character begins in the middle of a wide urban crosswalk, walking toward the sidewalk. A brown office tower rises on the left while a modern glass building stands on the right. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction in the crosswalk as the character steps onto the sidewalk.

lime green van passes by on the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a tree-lined city sidewalk, the character passes a yellow fire hydrant and clusters of mailboxes. An orange SUV and green van drive past on the adjacent street. The modern glass building remains visible on the right while the brown office tower recedes behind.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at an intersection, passing a woman walking on the sidewalk. A bus stop shelter with glass panels appears on the left, and a red parking structure becomes visible. A yellow sports car is parked near the garage entrance while a large digital billboard towers on the right.

segments.scene_description: Walking between towering buildings in a downtown corridor, the character approaches a massive glass skyscraper in the distance. An elevated highway is visible far ahead. The character passes red mailboxes and navigates around pedestrians near a building entrance as the street narrows between high-rises.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling downtown district that transitions from wide open crosswalks to a dense corridor of towering skyscrapers. It begins with the character crossing a wide street between a brown office tower and a modern glass building, stepping onto a sidewalk as a pedestrian passes by. As the character moves forward, the brown tower recedes and the scene shifts along a tree-lined path past a yellow fire hydrant and mailboxes while an orange SUV and green van drive past. The camera then follows the character across another intersection, passing a glass bus shelter and a red parking structure with a parked yellow sports car before a massive digital billboard looms on the right. Finally, the environment narrows into a high-rise corridor, moving past red mailboxes and pedestrians toward a distant glass skyscraper and an elevated highway.
